name: beads-git-graph
description: Git graph and Beads issue tools for VS Code.

scripts.compile: pnpm run clean && pnpm run compile-src && pnpm run compile-web
scripts.package: pnpm run clean && pnpm dlx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies
scripts.package-and-install: pnpm run clean && pnpm dlx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies && node ./.vscode/install-package.js

beads-git-graph.autoCenterCommitDetailsV.description: Automatically center the commit details view when it is opened.

enumDescriptions: Show the date and time, for example "19 Mar 2019 21:34"
Show the date only, for example "19 Mar 2019"
Show relative times, for example "5 minutes ago"
beads-git-graph.dateFormat.description: Specifies the date format to be used in the date column of Git Graph.

enumDescriptions: Use the author date of a commit
Use the committer date of a commit
beads-git-graph.dateType.description: Specifies the date type to be displayed throughout Git Graph.

viewDiff.description: Show "View Diff" in the commit details file context menu.

viewDiffWithWorkingFile.description: Show "View Diff with Working File" in the commit details file context menu.

viewFileAtRevision.description: Show "View File at this Revision" in the commit details file context menu.

openFile.description: Show "Open File" in the commit details file context menu.

resetFileToRevision.description: Show "Reset File to this Revision..." in the commit details file context menu.

copyRelativeFilePath.description: Show "Copy Relative File Path to Clipboard" in the commit details file context menu.

copyAbsoluteFilePath.description: Show "Copy Absolute File Path to Clipboard" in the commit details file context menu.

beads-git-graph.commitDetailsFileActionV.description: Controls visibility of actions in the commit details file context menu.

beads-git-graph.enhancedAccessibility.description: Enable enhanced accessibility rendering, including showing file change type indicators (A, M, D, R, U) in commit details.

beads-git-graph.graphColours.description: Specifies the colours used on the graph.

enumDescriptions: Use smooth curves when transitioning between branches on the graph
Use angular lines when transitioning between branches on the graph
beads-git-graph.graphStyle.description: Specifies the style of the graph.

beads-git-graph.initialLoadCommits.description: Specifies the number of commits to initially load.

beads-git-graph.loadMoreCommits.description: Specifies the number of commits to load when the "Load More Commits" button is pressed (only shown when more commits are available).

beads-git-graph.referenceInputSpaceSubst.description: Specifies how spaces are substituted in reference-name dialog inputs (for example, Create Branch and Add Tag).

beads-git-graph.maxDepthOfRepoSearch.description: Specifies the maximum depth of subfolders to search when discovering repositories in the workspace.

enumDescriptions: Sort repositories by full workspace path.
Sort repositories by repository folder name.
beads-git-graph.repoDropdownOrder.description: Specifies how repositories are sorted in the repository dropdown.

beads-git-graph.showCurrentBranchByDefau.description: Show the current branch by default when Git Graph is opened. Default: false (show all branches)

beads-git-graph.preferMainBranchByDefaul.description: Prefer main branch-focused view when opening Git Graph. If enabled, defaults to main (or origin/main) before Show All.

beads-git-graph.hiddenBranchPatterns.description: Regex patterns for branch names to hide by default in branch lists and ref labels (current checked out branch remains visible).

beads-git-graph.mutedGraphOpacity.description: Opacity applied to de-emphasized db/beads graph lines and nodes.

beads-git-graph.mutedGraphLineWidth.description: Stroke width of de-emphasized db/beads graph lines.

beads-git-graph.mutedGraphNodeRadius.description: Node radius of de-emphasized db/beads graph commits.

beads-git-graph.showStatusBarItem.description: Show a Status Bar item which opens Git Graph when clicked.

beads-git-graph.showUncommittedChanges.description: Show uncommitted changes (set to false to decrease load time on large repositories).

beads-git-graph.bdPath.description: Path or command name for the Beads CLI executable used by the Beads view.

enumDescriptions: Show a colour icon which suits most Visual Studio Code colour themes
Show a grey icon which suits Visual Studio Code colour themes that are predominantly grayscale
beads-git-graph.tabIconColourTheme.description: Specifies the colour theme of the icon displayed on the Git Graph tab.
